complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.本页说明如何通过 **自动编程向导** 完整创建一个新的 PCBA 产品。向导共: This page explains how to create a new PCBA product end-to-end with the **Auto-Programming Wizard**. The wizard has four steps: Basic Info, Conveyor & Capture, Configure Auto-Program, and Add CAD (the last step is covered in :doc:`auto_programming`).
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.在 **基本信息** 步骤中填写以下内容，完成后点击 **下一步**：: On the **Basic Info** step, fill in the following, then click **Next**:
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**产品名称** — 输入唯一的产品名称。若名称已存在，系统将提示\"名称重复\: **Product Name** — enter a unique product name. If the name already exists, the system returns a "Name duplicated" error and you must re-enter it.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**标签** — 在下拉框中选择或输入标签，可用于对产品分类管理；多个标签以逗号: **Tags** — pick or type tags from the drop-down to categorize the product; comma-separated for multiple tags.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**板长 / 板宽** — 直接输入已知的 PCB 尺寸，单位毫米，通常来自产品: **Board Length / Board Width** — type in the known PCB dimensions in millimeters, usually taken from the product drawing or the SMT work order. The dimensions are fixed once the product is created; the wizard no longer measures them with the camera.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.检测类型、自动编程参数与健康检查不再在本步骤设置，已移至第三步 **配置自动编程: Inspection types, auto-programming parameters, and health checks are no longer set on this step — they have moved to Step 3, **Configure Auto-Program**, where they are configured in front of the stitched full image.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.本步骤将\"上板\"与\"完整拍摄\"合并为一个连续动作：: This step merges loading the board and full capture into one continuous action:
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.将 PCB 平整放置于传送带中央，选择传送带并点击 **锁定**。: Place the PCB flat in the center of the conveyor, select the conveyor, and click **Lock**.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.在线版本中确认或调整 **传送带宽度**。: On the online version, confirm or adjust the **Conveyor Width**.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.点击 **进板**，等待 PCB 自动输送至拍摄区域。: Click **Load Board** and wait for the PCB to be conveyed to the capture area.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.点击 **拍摄2D图像**，系统联动相机与传送带分区采集并拼接生成完整 PCB: Click **Capture 2D Image**; the system coordinates the camera and conveyor to acquire the board in tiles and stitch the full PCB image, which is shown directly on this step's canvas.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.请务必使用洁净、无缺陷的良品板（Golden board）。必要时可在该界面调整: Always use a clean, defect-free **Golden board**. If needed, tune camera parameters such as **Exposure**, **Gain**, and **gamma** on this screen and re-capture. Once the stitched image looks right, click **Next**.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.在 **配置自动编程** 步骤中，系统显示上一步拼接出的完整图像（只读）。在此定: On the **Configure Auto-Program** step, the system shows the full image stitched in the previous step (read-only). Here you define the inspection region, panelization, inspection types and parameters, and health checks; then click **Next**.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**定义检测区域** — 点击 **定义区域**，支持两种方式：: **Define the inspection region** — click **Define Region**; two ways are supported:
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**设置矩形检测区域** — 在图像上拖动框选矩形范围。: **Set Rect Inspection Region** — drag to box a rectangular area on the image.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**设置多边形检测区域** — 在图像上 **按顺时针方向** 依次点击多个顶点: **Set Polygon Inspection Region** — click vertices in **clockwise** order on the image, then **double-click** to finish the polygon.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.检测区域决定自动编程 AI 识别和生成检测框的范围，通常框选整板；若需排除治具边: The inspection region defines the area within which auto-programming detects and generates inspection boxes — usually the whole board; shrink it if fixture edges should be excluded. It must be defined before you advance, otherwise the system reports an error.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**拼板** — 若产品为拼板，开启 **启用拼板** 开关并填写 **行数**: **Panelization** — if the product is panelized, turn on the **Enable panelization** switch and enter **Num of Rows** / **Num of Cols**. When panelization is on, the inspection region above must be drawn around **a single representative sub-board**, not the whole panel; after auto-programming the system builds the panel array accordingly. See the "Post-programming automation" section in :doc:`auto_programming`.
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**自动编程检测类型：** — 勾选需要 AI 自动生成 ROI 的检测类型。每: **AI-modelled inspection types:** — check the inspection types you want the AI to auto-generate ROIs for. Each type can be expanded to pick specific package sub-classes:
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**自动编程参数** — 根据已勾选的检测类型，展开对应的参数配置，仅当对应类型: **Auto Programming Parameters** — expand the parameter block for the inspection types you checked; each block is shown only when its type is enabled:
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**DIP 参数** — DIP 检测启用时显示：: **DIP parameters** — shown when DIP inspection is enabled:
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**焊盘沾胶参数** — 焊盘沾胶检测启用时显示：: **Glue on Pad parameters** — shown when Glue on Pad inspection is enabled:
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.**元件本体颜色参数** — 元件本体颜色检测启用时显示：: **Component Body Color parameters** — shown when Component Body Color inspection is enabled:
complete_user_guide/features/create_prod.完成 **配置自动编程** 步骤后点击 **下一步**，进入 **添加CAD (: After finishing the **Configure Auto-Program** step, click **Next** to reach the **Add CAD (Optional)** step; from there you can choose full auto-programming, semi-auto programming, or manual programming. See :doc:`auto_programming`.

complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.向导的前三步（基本信息、上板与拍摄、配置自动编程）在 :ref:`创建产品` 中: The first three wizard steps (Basic Info, Conveyor & Capture, Configure Auto-Program) are documented in :ref:`创建产品`. This page focuses on the fourth step, "Add CAD (Optional)": uploading CAD and running auto-programming.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.完成 **配置自动编程** 步骤后，向导进入第四步 **添加CAD (可选)**: Once the **Configure Auto-Program** step is complete, the wizard advances to Step 4, **Add CAD (Optional)**. The step offers three actions:
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.检测区域已在上一步 **配置自动编程** 中定义，本步骤无需再次框选（见 :re: The inspection region was already defined on the previous **Configure Auto-Program** step, so there is no need to box it again here (see :ref:`创建产品`).
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.系统会基于 **配置自动编程** 步骤中定义的自动编程检测类型，自动识别并分割所: The system uses the auto-programming inspection types defined on the **Configure Auto-Program** step to detect and segment matching components, then generates the initial inspection boxes.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**仅编程 CAD 中的元件** — 可选。勾选后，AI 检测到但 CAD 文件: **Only program components in CAD** — optional. When checked, components detected by AI that are not present in the CAD file are discarded, keeping only those matched to the CAD. Unchecked by default.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.**CAD 对齐容差 (px)** — 可选。投影后的 CAD 点与检测到的元件: **CAD alignment tolerance (px)** — optional. The maximum pixel distance between a projected CAD point and a detected component for them to count as matched during alignment; larger values are more lenient, smaller values are stricter. Default 30; 0 disables matching entirely.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.上述 **使用元件模板**、**仅编程 CAD 中的元件** 与 **CAD 对: The **Use Component Templates**, **Only program components in CAD**, and **CAD alignment tolerance (px)** options can all be set on both the **Parse File** and **Align Coordinates** screens (the latter when re-analyzing).
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.大致对齐后，点击 **重新分析** 重新执行匹配。在 **对齐坐标** 界面也可: After roughly aligning, click **Re-analyze** to rerun the match. On the **Align Coordinates** screen you can also adjust the **CAD alignment tolerance (px)**, or toggle **Use Component Templates** / **Only program components in CAD** before clicking **Re-analyze** again.
complete_user_guide/features/auto_progra.首次运行时已完成的器件检测结果会被缓存。只要拍摄图像未变化，**重新分析** 只: The component detection completed on the first run is cached. As long as the captured image is unchanged, **Re-analyze** only re-runs the coordinate alignment and does not repeat the time-consuming AI detection, so a **Re-analyze** after several manual alignment attempts usually takes only seconds. A **Re-analyze** after adjusting the **CAD alignment tolerance (px)** or toggling the options above also hits the cache.
